Case Study • Various

How we helped T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd Achieves EcoVadis Platinum Medal — A Distinction Earned by Less Than 1% of Companies Globally

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Joining the World’s Most Exclusive Sustainability Elite on First Attempt

T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd, a leading innovator in acoustic glazed partition systems solution, has achieved what most companies spend years pursuing: the prestigious EcoVadis Platinum Medal — an honor bestowed upon less than 1% of over 130,000 assessed companies worldwide. This extraordinary milestone, achieved in 2025, places T1 Glass among an exceptionally exclusive group — fewer than 1,300 companies out of the entire global assessment pool hold this distinction. What makes this achievement even more remarkable is that T1 Glass earned Platinum scoring of 95 in their inaugural EcoVadis assessment, places T1 Glass among the most sustainable companies globally — setting a new benchmark for transparency and accountability in the architectural glass and acoustic partition industry.

T1 Glass Systems joins this circle with a result that highlights the company’s early vision, disciplined approach, and authentic commitment to building sustainability into the way they operate.

Outstanding Performance Across All Sustainability Pillars

T1 Glass Systems delivered exceptional scores across all four EcoVadis assessment pillars:

Environment: 100 / 100

Labor & Human Rights: 98 / 100

Ethics: 73 / 100

Sustainable Procurement: 97 / 100

Overall Score: 95 / 100

Global Percentile Ranking: 99+ (Top 1% Worldwide)

This achievement is particularly significant for a company operating in the construction and interior solutions sector, where sustainability leadership requires innovation not just in products, but across the entire value chain — from responsible material sourcing to installation practices and end-of-life considerations.

The Strategic Partnership Behind the Success

T1 Glass Systems’ historic achievement was made possible through its strategic collaboration with Growlity Inc, a premier ESG and sustainability consulting firm with proven expertise in guiding organizations to global ESG excellence.

The partnership exemplified how strategic ESG advisory, combined with organizational commitment, can accelerate sustainability maturity and achieve world-class recognition.

What Makes This Achievement Extraordinary

Achieving EcoVadis Platinum in the first assessment represents:

Immediate Global Recognition: Instant positioning among the world’s top 1% most sustainable companies

Strategic Foresight: Proactive integration of ESG excellence into business strategy from day one

Competitive Advantage: Differentiation in markets where sustainability credentials drive business opportunities

Regional Leadership: Setting new standards for the Southeast Asian interior solutions industry

Leadership Perspectives

Achieving the EcoVadis Platinum Medal on our very first assessment is a deeply meaningful milestone for T1 Glass Systems. It affirms our belief that creating great workspaces isn’t just about acoustic performance or innovation — it’s also about doing things the right way for people and the planet.

Sustainability has always been part of how we work with our clients, support our partners, and grow across Southeast Asia, and this recognition encourages us to keep raising that standard.

We’re truly thankful to Growlity for walking this journey with us and helping us turn our sustainability goals into clear, measurable progress.

Mr. Glen Tew

Managing  Director, T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd

_Being part of our EcoVadis Platinum journey has been one of the most meaningful experiences in my career. This milestone was only possible because every team — from operations and procurement to leadership and frontline staff — understood that sustainability isn’t a checklist, but a daily practice._Working with Growlity helped us shape and express the responsibility we’ve always believed in. This Platinum recognition belongs to everyone at T1 who played a part, big or small, in building a culture grounded in integrity, care, and accountability.

Ms. Jessica Chong

Project Manager for Digital Transformation | Sustainability Manager, T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd

T1 Glass Systems’ achievement of the EcoVadis Platinum Medal in their inaugural assessment is truly extraordinary. This outcome reflects exceptional leadership commitment, operational excellence, and a genuine understanding that sustainability is not an afterthought but a core business imperative.

Working with T1 Glass has been inspiring — their team demonstrated remarkable agility, transparency, and dedication to building ESG excellence into their organizational fabric. They have set a powerful example for companies across Southeast Asia and beyond.”

Dr. Nitin Dumasia

President & CEO, Growlity Inc.

First-time Platinum recognition is the exception, not the norm, in the EcoVadis ecosystem. T1 Glass Systems achieved this through a rare combination of strategic clarity, robust systems, and authentic commitment to sustainability values.

Their willingness to invest in comprehensive ESG infrastructure, embrace transparency, and pursue excellence across all assessment dimensions resulted in this historic outcome. This success story demonstrates that organizations don’t need decades to achieve world-class sustainability performance.

Mr. Shwetang Kapadia

Vice President — ESG Advisory, Growlity Inc.

About T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd

T1 Glass Systems Pte Ltd is Southeast Asia’s premier provider of innovative acoustic glazed partition solutions for modern workspaces. Specializing in sound-mitigating interior systems that combine exceptional acoustic performance with aesthetic excellence, T1 Glass serves leading corporations across the region. The company’s vision extends beyond delivering products — it aims to shape the future of Southeast Asian workspaces by creating environments that inspire collaboration, productivity, and growth while upholding the highest standards of environmental and social responsibility.

About Growlity Inc.

Growlity is a leading ESG and sustainability consulting firm dedicated to helping organizations achieve measurable and credible sustainability outcomes. With deep expertise in EcoVadis assessments, ESG strategy development, sustainability reporting, climate action, and supply chain sustainability, Growlity empowers businesses to translate their sustainability vision into actionable performance.
